title: A cable end clip
abstract: A cable end clip is provided including a lower housing, a upper housing, a hinge operably connecting the lower housing to the upper housing, a clip fastener configured to retain the lower housing and the upper housing in a shut position when engaged, and a plurality of ribs disposed on an inner face of the lower housing and the upper housing. The ribs are configured to compress and retain a cable when the upper housing and lower housing are in the shut position and the ribs comprise two or more diameters configured to retain cables of two or more diameters.
claims: Claims THAT WHICH IS CLAIMED: 1. A cable end clip comprising: a lower housing; an upper housing; a hinge operably connecting the lower housing to the upper housing; a clip fastener configured to retain the lower housing and the upper housing in a shut position when engaged; and a plurality of ribs disposed on an inner face of the lower housing and the upper housing, wherein the ribs are configured to compress and retain a cable when the upper housing and lower housing are in the shut position, and wherein the ribs comprise two or more diameters configured to retain cables of two or more diameters. 2. The cable end clip of claim 1, wherein the lower housing and the upper housing, when in the shut position, comprise a stop seat opposite the hinge configured to prevent the cable end clip from passing through an aperture of any of the two or more diameters. 3. The cable end clip of claim 2, wherein the stop seat is configured to seat around a handle aperture of a submersible pump. 4. The cable end clip of any of claims 3, wherein the cable end clip is configured to support the weight of the submersible pump. 5. The cable clip end of any of claims 1-4, wherein the two or more diameters comprise at least two of about 3mm, about 5mm, about 8mm, and about 12mm. 6. The cable end clip of any of claims 1-5, wherein the lower housing and the upper housing, when in the shut position, comprise a substantially conical exterior surface. 7. The cable end clip of any of Claims 1-5, wherein the lower housing and the upper housing, when in the shut position, comprise a cylindrical or rectangular external surface. 8. The cable end clip of any of claims 1-7, wherein the lower housing, the upper housing, the hinge, the clip fastener, and the plurality of ribs are integrally formed. 9. The cable end clip of any of claims 1-7, wherein the lower housing and the upper housing are separate pieces. 10. The cable end clip of any of claims 1-9, wherein the cable end clip is formed by injection molding. 11. The cable end clip of any of claims 1-7, wherein the ribs are triangular. 12. The cable end clip of any of claims 1-10, wherein the ribs are rounded. 13. The cable end clip of any of claims 1-10, wherein the ribs are squared. 14. The cable end clip of any of claims 1-13, wherein the clip fastener comprises at least one clip and at least one corresponding lip configured to engage the at least one clip in the shut position. 15. The cable end clip of any of claims 1-13, wherein the clip fastener comprises a grommet or band configured to be placed around the upper housing and the lower housing in the shut position. 16. The cable end clip of any of claims 1-13, wherein the clip fastener comprises a hose clamp or cable tie configured to be placed around the upper housing and the lower housing in the shut position.
